title: PlanBench Example
description: A 4-item local delivery-planning fixture used only by tests.
baseline_summary: A placeholder planner that returns an empty plan for the active example delivery problem.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher solved ratio is better across independently evolved example planning item runs. Shorter valid plans break ties.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(problem: dict) must return a list of action strings for the active delivery problem using the grammar drive/pickup/drop. Do not use browsing or external network access.
